_note: Caption styles referenced by EDL clip.caption.style. Rendered via ffmpeg drawtext with expansion=none (literal text; % is safe). 'font' points at a real .ttf shipped in assets/fonts (copied from Windows fonts for local use). Sizes are for a 1080-wide frame; they scale down automatically for previews.
_fonts_note: Bundled fonts are copies of Windows system fonts for personal/local use. Replace with your own licensed fonts (e.g. Montserrat) for distribution.
